blended.narrative: Hoodoo is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,872 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 6".
